prompt: Go to en.wikipedia.org and look up "Programming language comparison". Create a ```table comparing Python, JavaScript, Rust, and Go with columns: Language, Year Created, Typing, Use Case, Creator. Use REAL data from Wikipedia.
text:
Based on the Wikipedia articles, here's the comparison table:

```table
| Language   | Year Created | Typing              | Use Case                              | Creator                    |
|------------|--------------|---------------------|---------------------------------------|----------------------------|
| Python     | 1991         | Dynamic, strong     | Web dev, data science, ML, automation| Guido van Rossum           |
| JavaScript | 1995         | Dynamic, weak       | Web development, server-side (Node.js)| Brendan Eich               |
| Rust       | 2012         | Static, strong      | Systems programming, browsers        | Graydon Hoare              |
| Go         | 2009         | Static, strong      | Web servers, cloud, networking       | Robert Griesemer, Rob Pike, Ken Thompson |
```
